data.body: S2a (89f9) DONE via held-out TDD: authored 2 happy + 11 held-out tests (RED confirmed via NotImplementedError stubs), held out the edge/E2E oracle, subagent implemented gerrit.py + loop.py against happy-path only, full suite GREEN (13/13), teeth verified (FIFO min->max and drop-chain-branch mutations both caught). Committed + pushed as Gerrit change #583 (stacked on #582). NOTE: mid-run, review-plan's attested-mode git handling left a stray 'wip-mixed' stash APPLIED into the worktree, injecting merge-conflict markers into 4 core files (config.py, plan_review/*, materialize-g2p-config.sh) — resolved by git checkout HEAD (stash preserved in list, no data loss). Same review-plan subsystem as bug 5e40. NOTE2: infra/autolander/*.py is outside make lint/typecheck scope (sources=src tests); tests/autolander IS linted. Claiming S2b next.
